headline: Consumer Portfolio Services Q4 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Consumer Portfolio Services (NASDAQ:CPSS) executives said 2025 delivered strong profitability and improving credit trends, even as originations were essentially flat amid weaker dealer traffic and competitive pressure. headline: CPSS Reports Earnings
summary: Charles Bradley: Thank you, and welcome, everyone, to the fourth quarter and year-end conference call.  For the full year, we had fair value marks of $6.5 million compared to $21 million the prior year.

raw.headline: CPSS Reports Earnings
raw.summary: Charles Bradley: Thank you, and welcome, everyone, to the fourth quarter and year-end conference call.  For the full year, we had fair value marks of $6.5 million compared to $21 million the prior year.

headline: BRIDGE Housing Exceeds $90 Million at First Close of New Impact Fund to Acquire and Create Affordable and Workforce Housing on the West Coast
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, March 11, 2026--BRIDGE Housing, the leading nonprofit affordable housing owner and developer on the West Coast, today announced the first close of BRIDGE Housing Impact Fund I with more than $90 million, marking a major milestone for the innovative investment platform to accelerate the acquisition, preservation, and construction of affordable and workforce housing in high-cost markets.

headline: BofA Lowers Capital One (COF) Price Objective on Weaker Market Multiples
summary: Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE:COF) is included among the 14 Best American Dividend Stocks to Invest in. On March 9, BofA lowered its price objective on Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE:COF) to $254 from $280 and kept a Buy rating on the shares.
